title: Global Risk Clocks
summary: Speculative pressure scores enriched with latest dated public-source drops. These remain evidence-boundary signals, not predictions or claims of certainty.
homepageRule: Only clocks at 90 percent or above may surface on the homepage. Epstein alerts may surface only when active and before their expiry date.
evidenceRule: Use dated public signals only. Keep speculation labelled. Do not repeat the risk terminal across the page as if it is a live counter.

clocks.title: WWIII Escalation Clock
clocks.signals: Ukraine approved a new 40-day pressure campaign against Russian war-support facilities; Hormuz shipping has partially reopened but route risk and ceasefire fragility remain; Gaza, Iran, Lebanon, Red Sea, sanctions, and nuclear rhetoric stay active. Policy convergence tracker lanes: War / Security / Emergency Powers. policyConvergenceLinks.readerQuestion: Are national policies being aligned through global standards without clear democratic oversight?
policyConvergenceLinks.timerTrigger: Global standards, treaties, model laws, funding conditions, or procurement rules begin routing into domestic mandates.
policyConvergenceLinks.escalationRule: Escalate only when a soft-law or policy framework becomes a domestic mandate, procurement requirement, or integrated identity/money/security rule.

policyConvergenceLinks.readerQuestion: Is identity becoming a master permission key?
policyConvergenceLinks.timerTrigger: Digital identity becomes mandatory, biometric, cross-border, or linked to money, travel, benefits, health, age verification, or online access.
policyConvergenceLinks.escalationRule: Move from watch to active when identity is no longer optional for a major service; move higher when it integrates with payment or speech systems.

policyConvergenceLinks.readerQuestion: Is crisis converting civilian life into permanent security architecture?
policyConvergenceLinks.timerTrigger: War, cyber, terror, or emergency language expands surveillance, contractor access, censorship, or domestic security power.
policyConvergenceLinks.escalationRule: Escalate when emergency powers renew, security contractors enter civilian systems, or domestic restrictions are justified by external conflict.

policyConvergenceLinks.readerQuestion: Is speech control being routed through platform and payment infrastructure?
policyConvergenceLinks.timerTrigger: Speech, search, payment, advertising, or platform access becomes governed by state-linked or public-private enforcement systems.
policyConvergenceLinks.escalationRule: Escalate when enforcement moves from platform policy into law, payment rails, search suppression, identity gating, or state-linked flagging.

policyConvergenceLinks.trackerTitle: Health Governance / Biosecurity / Emergency Health Powers
policyConvergenceLinks.readerQuestion: Is public health becoming a governance operating system?
policyConvergenceLinks.timerTrigger: Health governance connects to identity, travel, work, emergency law, procurement, digital records, or speech policy.
policyConvergenceLinks.escalationRule: Escalate when health credentials or emergency powers become tied to travel, work, benefits, data exchange, or identity wallets.

policyConvergenceLinks.readerQuestion: Is movement being managed through identity, biometric, and security infrastructure?
policyConvergenceLinks.timerTrigger: Migration, border, biometric, NGO-state, housing, labor, or digital travel systems become integrated with identity and security infrastructure.
policyConvergenceLinks.escalationRule: Escalate when border biometrics become national identity rails, emergency contracts expand, or security narratives drive domestic powers.

clocks.timerUpdateRule: When a linked policy lane moves from mention to pilot, procurement, mandate, integration, or lock-in, update this clock with source, date, actor, jurisdiction, evidence level, and boundary.

policyConvergenceLinks.readerQuestion: Is money becoming a permission layer?
policyConvergenceLinks.timerTrigger: CBDC, tokenized deposits, programmable compliance, cash restrictions, or identity-linked wallets move from papers into pilots, contracts, or mandates.
policyConvergenceLinks.escalationRule: Escalate on procurement, legal mandate, banking rollout, wallet identity requirement, transaction restriction, or cross-border integration.

policyConvergenceLinks.readerQuestion: Are energy and climate systems becoming a behaviour-management layer?
policyConvergenceLinks.timerTrigger: Climate or energy policy moves into carbon accounts, smart-meter enforcement, mobility restrictions, food/farm controls, ESG finance, or emergency powers.
policyConvergenceLinks.escalationRule: Escalate when policy becomes mandatory, financially enforced, linked to payments, or restricts movement, energy, food, or land use.

policyConvergenceLinks.readerQuestion: Are food and land systems becoming control infrastructure instead of local resilience?
policyConvergenceLinks.timerTrigger: Food, water, land, seed, farm, fertilizer, traceability, rationing, or supply-chain rules become centralized through corporate-state policy networks.
policyConvergenceLinks.escalationRule: Escalate when rules pressure local production, mandate traceability, concentrate ownership, or link food access to identity, carbon, or finance systems.

latestDrops.title: Five Eyes warns frontier AI cyber-attack capability could arrive within months

method: Classify the found item by tracker lane.
Attach source link, actor, date, jurisdiction, and record boundary.
Update linked clock notes and nextRoute to control-system-tracker.html when relevant.
Only raise homepageEligible when score is 90 or above and the signal is time-sensitive.
Never update a timer from rumor alone. Use rumor only as an open-source lead.

evidenceLevels.5: Integration across two or more systems

policyConvergence.boundary: Timer movement is an editorial pressure signal, not a prediction or claim of certainty. Every timer update should be linked to a source class, evidence level, date, actor, jurisdiction, and record boundary.
